prose: **Pyridine Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (density-fit, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral); cation/anion states at charge ±1, multiplicity 2. Geometry: fixed from input `.xyz`. Fukui indices computed via finite-difference scheme: f⁺ from SCF on (N+1) cation; f⁻ from SCF on (N−1) anion; f⁰ as average. Partial charges via Mulliken population analysis. **SCF converged for all three states.** Fukui charge conservation: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000 — both passes (no convergence anomalies flagged). Integrity trustworthy; no warnings. **Most electrophilic site: atom 1 (N), f⁺ = 0.48423.** **Most nucleophilic site: atom 4 (C ortho), f⁻ = 0.11826.** Dual descriptor for N = 0.42010 (electrophilic). Hydrogens uniformly nucleophilic (negative dual descriptor, −0.23 to −0.21). Visualization PNG written. Reproducible command and result JSON path provided above.
